2605.22446.title: Pre-VLA: Preemptive Runtime Verification for Reliable Vision-Language-Action and World-Model Rollouts
2605.22446.paper_summary: While large vision-language-action (VLA) models and generative world models (WM) have advanced long-horizon embodied intelligence, their practical deployment remains challenged by uncertainty in learning-based action generation. Low-quality actions may cause physical failures during execution or lead to misleading world-model rollouts with redundant rendering costs. To address this issue, we propose Pre-VLA, a unified runtime verification architecture that performs preemptive action validity assessment before physical execution or world-model imagination. Pre-VLA leverages an efficient multimodal backbone with modality-aware pooling and a lightweight dual-branch head to predict both safety confidence and critic-derived advantage scores for candidate action chunks. To handle severe class imbalance and unstable boundary decisions, we train Pre-VLA with a multi-task objective combining Focal classification, advantage regression, and soft-threshold calibration. During deployment, a dual-mode preemptive resampling scheduler filters low-quality actions and triggers adaptive resampling under a limited computation budget. Experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that Pre-VLA improves the average closed-loop success rate across four suites from 30.79\% to 37.62\% over RynnVLA-002, reduces task execution steps, achieves 183.9 ms average forward verification time per action chunk, and mitigates error accumulation in world-model rollouts.
2605.22446.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型和生成世界模型（WM）雖然在長期體現智能方面取得了進展，但其實際部署仍面臨基於學習的行動生成的不確定性挑戰。低質量的行動可能在執行過程中導致物理故障，或導致冗餘渲染成本的誤導性世界模型展開。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了Pre-VLA，一種統一的運行時驗證架構，在物理執行或世界模型想像之前進行預防性的行動有效性評估。Pre-VLA利用高效的多模態骨幹，結合模態感知的池化和輕量級的雙分支頭，來預測候選行動片段的安全信心和批評者導出的優勢分數。為了處理嚴重的類別不平衡和不穩定的邊界決策，我們用結合焦點分類、優勢回歸和軟閾值校準的多任務目標來訓練Pre-VLA。在部署期間，雙模式預防性重採樣調度器過濾低質量行動，並在有限的計算預算下觸發自適應重採樣。在LIBERO基準上的實驗顯示，Pre-VLA將四個套件的平均閉環成功率從30.79\%提高到37.62\%，減少了任務執行步驟，實現了每個行動片段183.9毫秒的平均前向驗證時間，並減輕了世界模型展開中的錯誤累積。
2605.22446.author: Zhen Sun et.al.
2605.22446.authors: Zhen Sun, Yongjian Guo, Haoran Sun, Luqiao Wang, Wei Lu, Jiachi Ji, Shengzhe Ji, Junwu Xiong, Zhijun Meng
